page.title: Invoices
page.listLead: Server-filtered invoice list with batch actions (print, export, reconcile). Open details for TSE traces, context, and FinanzOnline links.

filters.registerListFilterApiFootnote: Free text is passed unchanged to the list API; deep links to the reconciliation page only with a valid UUID.
filters.invalidRegisterOnlyCheckboxLabel: Only rows without a valid register UUID (no link FK)

dateRange.blocksQuerySuffix: The list loads only once the date range is valid.

registerFilter.invalidTitle: Register filter without a safe deep link
registerFilter.invalidDescription: The value is sent to the list API but does not meet the UUID rule for safe register deep links (FinanzOnline reconciliation). Select the register explicitly in the reconciliation view.

errors.listGeneric: The list could not be loaded. Please try again or check your filters.
errors.listUnauthorized: Not signed in or session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.listForbidden: No permission to access the invoice list.
errors.listNotFound: List endpoint not found. Please contact support.
errors.listServer: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.listNetwork: Network error. Check the connection and try again.

empty.loadFailedHint: Check connection, permissions, and filters. Widen or reset filters, then reload.
empty.dateRange: No invoices in the selected period. Adjust filters.
empty.moreHint: Tip: narrow search, status, period, or register. Cancellation reference and full TSE data are in the detail view.

listSummary.clientFilterNote: Client filter active: visible rows on a page may be fewer than the page size.
listSummary.staleAfterErrorNote: Note: the table shows the last successful response — the current request failed.

list.kassenHeaderTooltip: Display cash register ID; register FK (raw value) in the cell tooltip.
list.kassenCellTooltipWithFk: Register FK (raw value from API list): {{fk}}
list.kassenCellTooltipNoFk: No cashRegisterId in list DTO — column shows display text only.
list.tseHeaderTooltip: TSE signature preview; full value in the detail dialog.

rowActions.detailExtendedTooltip: Invoice dialog: line items, TSE, register, FinanzOnline context.
rowActions.printTooltip: Open PDF in a new tab

batch.reconcileHandoffBody: {{success}} invoice/payment rows processed. Please check the current reconciliation status.

messages.batchReconcileSummary: Reconcile: {{ok}} ok, {{fail}} failed, {{skipped}} skipped, {{already}} already submitted.
messages.pdfSessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.
messages.noPaymentLinkedForReconcile: No linked payment found for reconciliation.
messages.creditNoteExists: A credit note already exists for this invoice.
messages.creditNoteFailed: Credit note could not be created.

modals.batchReconcileBody: Trigger FinanzOnline reconciliation for {{count}} selected row(s)?

handoff.registerFilterOmitted: Note: this invoice’s register FK is not link-safe (not a valid non-nil UUID). The reconciliation URL therefore omits the cashRegisterId filter; payment and batch context in the URL remain.
handoff.defaultFooter: Opens the FinanzOnline reconciliation view with filters. Valid payment and batch correlation IDs are carried in the URL as context or focus — see the note on the reconciliation page.

creditNote.alertDescription: Creates a credit note with negative amounts (verify accounting impact).
creditNote.formReasonTextAreaPlaceholder: Briefly explain why the credit note is required …

reconciliation.failedOpenQueueHint: Open FinanzOnline reconciliation to review status/retry state.
reconciliation.errorOpenQueueHint: You can open the reconciliation view to check the current state.

detail.retryFooterHint: Retry: FinanzOnline reconciliation via the button at the bottom of this dialog (footer).
detail.itemsParseErrorTitle: invoiceItems could not be read as JSON
detail.itemsNoRows: No line items (empty or null after normalization).
detail.foLinkRegisterOnly: FinanzOnline reconciliation (this register, with URL context)
detail.provenanceUntypedApiNote: Value from API response; not yet typed as a required field in the generated client.
detail.provenanceOperatorFooter: Without a typed invoiceDataProvenance field in the OpenAPI client, persistence vs. payment derivation remains ambiguous (no heuristic from other fields). Links use cashRegisterId (machine link), not kassenId — see contract gaps.
detail.emptyLoadFailed: No details loaded or error while loading.
